title: Welcome to Frontend Lab
content: Use this squad to swap design system notes, frontend debugging tricks, and thoughtful write-ups about the trade-offs behind UI architecture. The best posts here usually include context, not just a hot take.
contentHtml:
Use this squad to swap design system notes, frontend debugging tricks, and thoughtful write-ups about the trade-offs behind UI architecture.

The best posts here usually include context, not just a hot take.
summary: An onboarding-style welcome post for a more active local squad feed.
